description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages (docker, test) using the rust:latest image for Rust jobs and docker:latest with a docker:dind service for the docker job. Add a docker job that runs only on schedules, logs in to the GitLab registry, cd's into ci/docker/rust, builds the Rust Docker image with "docker build --no-cache -t registry.gitlab.com/dzamlo/gitlab-ci-rust-test/rust:latest ." and pushes it. Define test-beta, test-clippy, test-fmt, test-minimal-versions, test-nightly, test-prerelase and test-stable jobs in the test stage, each using a before_script that exports CARGO_HOME, prints rustup/rustc/cargo versions, and sharing a cache of "cargo/" and "target/" keyed by job name and branch. The test jobs run specific cargo commands: test-beta runs "cargo test --all --verbose" with RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN=beta; test-clippy runs "cargo clippy --all --verbose -- -D warnings" with nightly; test-fmt runs "cargo fmt --all --verbose -- --check" with nightly; test-minimal-versions runs "cargo test --all --verbose -Z minimal-versions" with nightly; test-nightly runs the standard test command with nightly; test-prerelase (manual) uses a custom before_script on buildpack-deps:stretch to install rustup, sets CARGO_HOME and RUSTUP_DIST_SERVER, then runs "cargo test --all --verbose" and "cargo fmt --all --verbose -- --write-mode=diff"; test-stable runs the standard test command with stable. No artifacts are defined.
